name: OBI/Deep-Book Consensus with Spread Filter
hypothesis: The strong consensus signal from BBO (obi_1) and deep-book (obi_ex_bbo) imbalance is most reliable in liquid, stable markets. Filtering out periods of wide spreads (spread_bps >= 10) will remove trades during potential liquidity shocks, improving the already high win rate.
mutation_note: Based on feedback that losses occurred during spread widening, a `spread_bps < 10` filter was added to the parent's high-conviction formula to enhance its robustness by gating for liquid market conditions.
